hero.title: Your health, right by the sea.
hero.subtitle: Prescriptions, vaccinations, health checks and expert advice — delivered with care and a human touch.

hours.title: Opening hours
hours.duty: * For on-duty hours outside of opening times, please consult the Thesprotia Pharmaceutical Association.

services.title: Services
services.intro: Everyday healthcare for the residents of Plataria and its visitors.

prescriptions.title: Prescriptions
prescriptions.body: Electronic and handwritten prescriptions — EOPYY and private.

vaccinations.title: Vaccinations
vaccinations.body: Seasonal flu, travel and booster shots — officially registered.

bp.title: Blood pressure
bp.body: Free blood-pressure measurement with personal history tracking.

glucose.title: Glucose & cholesterol
glucose.body: Quick capillary-blood tests with dietary advice.

consult.title: Pharmaceutical advice
consult.body: Interaction checks, chronic-therapy guidance, OTC selection.

orthopedic.title: Orthopedic supplies
orthopedic.body: Splints, belts, supports and mobility aids.

baby.title: Baby & child
baby.body: Formula, teats, hygiene products and vitamins for the little ones.

cosmetics.title: Cosmetics & parapharma
cosmetics.body: Selected dermo-cosmetic and high-protection sunscreen ranges.

delivery.title: Local delivery
delivery.body: Delivery within Plataria for elderly and reduced-mobility patients.

bio.title: Your pharmacist
bio.caption: {{PHARMACIST_NAME}} — Pharmacist
bio.paragraph1: {{PHARMACIST_NAME}} holds a degree in Pharmacy from {{UNIVERSITY}} ({{GRAD_YEAR}}) and has been serving the Plataria community since {{SINCE_YEAR}}.
bio.paragraph2: With a particular focus on chronic-disease management and care for older patients, the emphasis is on what matters most: the right treatment, at the right dose, with clear instructions.
bio.paragraph3: A member of the Thesprotia Pharmaceutical Association and a regular participant in continuing-education programs. Drop in for a chat — your first consultation is always free.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.intro: A glimpse of our space and daily life.
